A.rationale: Scoped strictly to logging as asked, explicitly deferred validation, one focused clarifying question; tightest answer, clean telemetry (only app.py).

B.rationale: Correct logging change but added unrequested input hardening (scope creep); longest, most restating; good clarifying question, clean telemetry.

C.rationale: Correct logging plus unrequested input guards (scope creep); left stray __pycache__ .pyc artifact, 6 turns; solid clarifying question.

notes: All three made the right minimal logging change and asked a clarifying question. A stayed strictly on-scope and tightest. B and C added unrequested validation; C also left a build artifact behind.
